---
title: "data: Multiple Imputation (MICE) for All Disorder Categories"
author: "Till Julius Adam"
date: "2026-04-03"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(mice)
library(writexl)
```

# Define disorders and shared variables

```{r}
disorders <- c(
  "AttentionDeficitHyperactivityDisorder",
  "SchizophreniaSpectrumAndOtherPsychoticDisorder",
  "BipolarAndRelatedDisorder",
  "DepressiveDisorder",
  "AnxietyDisorder",
  "TraumaAndStressorRelatedDisorder",
  "DisruptiveImpulseControlAndConductDisorders",
  "SubstanceAbuse"
)

short_names <- c(
  "ADHD", "Psychosis", "Bipolar", "Depression",
  "Anxiety", "Trauma", "Conduct", "Substance"
)

# Variables shared across all disorder imputations (excluding ID and SDM column)
shared_vars <- c(
  "Nr_Diag_R",
  "R_AttentionDeficitHyperactivityDisorder",
  "R_SchizophreniaSpectrumAndOtherPsychoticDisorder",
  "R_BipolarAndRelatedDisorder",
  "R_DepressiveDisorder",
  "R_AnxietyDisorder",
  "R_ObsessiveCompulsiveAndRelatedDisorders",
  "R_TraumaAndStressorRelatedDisorder",
  "R_FeedingAndEatingDisorders",
  "R_DisruptiveImpulseControlAndConductDisorders",
  "R_SubstanceAbuse",
  "R_PersonalityDisorder",
  "Ch_AttentionDeficitHyperactivityDisorder",
  "Ch_SchizophreniaSpectrumAndOtherPsychoticDisorder",
  "Ch_BipolarAndRelatedDisorder",
  "Ch_DepressiveDisorder",
  "Ch_AnxietyDisorder",
  "Ch_ObsessiveCompulsiveAndRelatedDisorders",
  "Ch_TraumaAndStressorRelatedDisorder",
  "Ch_FeedingAndEatingDisorders",
  "Ch_DisruptiveImpulseControlAndConductDisorders",
  "Ch_SubstanceAbuse",
  "Ch_PersonalityDisorder",
  "sex", "race", "AdoptedPatient", "Siblings", "Family_History_Any", "Smoking",
  "Age", "BMI", "SES_Average",
  "YMRS_total_1m", "MADRS_total", "GAF_Current",
  "SomaticConcern", "Anxiety", "EmotionalWithdrawal", "ConceptualDisorg",
  "GuiltFeelings", "Tension", "MannerismsPosturing", "Grandiosity",
  "DepressiveMood", "Hostility", "Suspiciousness", "HallucinatoryBehav",
  "MotorRetard", "Uncooperativeness", "UnusualThoughtContent", "BluntedAffect",
  "Excitement", "Disorientation",
  "SeverityOfIllness",
  "ROAS_POW_total"
)

# Method for each shared variable (ID and SDM column always "")
shared_methods <- c(
  Nr_Diag_R = "",
  R_AttentionDeficitHyperactivityDisorder = "",
  R_SchizophreniaSpectrumAndOtherPsychoticDisorder = "",
  R_BipolarAndRelatedDisorder = "",
  R_DepressiveDisorder = "",
  R_AnxietyDisorder = "",
  R_ObsessiveCompulsiveAndRelatedDisorders = "",
  R_TraumaAndStressorRelatedDisorder = "",
  R_FeedingAndEatingDisorders = "",
  R_DisruptiveImpulseControlAndConductDisorders = "",
  R_SubstanceAbuse = "",
  R_PersonalityDisorder = "",
  Ch_AttentionDeficitHyperactivityDisorder = "",
  Ch_SchizophreniaSpectrumAndOtherPsychoticDisorder = "",
  Ch_BipolarAndRelatedDisorder = "",
  Ch_DepressiveDisorder = "",
  Ch_AnxietyDisorder = "",
  Ch_ObsessiveCompulsiveAndRelatedDisorders = "",
  Ch_TraumaAndStressorRelatedDisorder = "",
  Ch_FeedingAndEatingDisorders = "",
  Ch_DisruptiveImpulseControlAndConductDisorders = "",
  Ch_SubstanceAbuse = "",
  Ch_PersonalityDisorder = "",
  sex = "logreg",
  race = "polyreg",
  AdoptedPatient = "logreg",
  Siblings = "logreg",
  Family_History_Any = "logreg",
  Smoking = "logreg",
  Age = "pmm",
  BMI = "pmm",
  SES_Average = "pmm",
  YMRS_total_1m = "pmm",
  MADRS_total = "pmm",
  GAF_Current = "pmm",
  SomaticConcern = "pmm",
  Anxiety = "pmm",
  EmotionalWithdrawal = "pmm",
  ConceptualDisorg = "pmm",
  GuiltFeelings = "pmm",
  Tension = "pmm",
  MannerismsPosturing = "pmm",
  Grandiosity = "pmm",
  DepressiveMood = "pmm",
  Hostility = "pmm",
  Suspiciousness = "pmm",
  HallucinatoryBehav = "pmm",
  MotorRetard = "pmm",
  Uncooperativeness = "pmm",
  UnusualThoughtContent = "pmm",
  BluntedAffect = "pmm",
  Excitement = "pmm",
  Disorientation = "pmm",
  SeverityOfIllness = "pmm",
  ROAS_POW_total = "pmm"
)
```

# Imputation function

```{r}
impute_disorder <- function(disorder, short_name) {
  cat("\n========================================\n")
  cat("Processing:", short_name, "(", disorder, ")\n")
  cat("========================================\n")

  sdm_col <- paste0("SDM_", disorder)

  # Read and filter
  data <- read_excel("data_simulated.xlsx")
  data <- data[data$ExamType == 1 & !is.na(data[[sdm_col]]), ]
  data$Adopted[data$Adopted == -7] <- NA
  # "Other" race excluded due to small cell size; treated as missing and imputed
  data$race[data$race == "Other"] <- NA

  cat("N after filtering:", nrow(data), "\n")

  # Select variables
  select_vars <- c("ID", sdm_col, shared_vars)
  df <- data[, select_vars]

  # Build method vector
  method_vec <- c(
    setNames("", "ID"),
    setNames("", sdm_col),
    shared_methods
  )

  # Enforce variable types
  for (v in names(method_vec)) {
    if (method_vec[v] == "pmm") {
      df[[v]] <- as.numeric(as.character(df[[v]]))
    } else if (method_vec[v] == "logreg") {
      df[[v]] <- as.factor(df[[v]])
    }
  }
  df$race <- as.factor(df$race)

  # Missingness summary
  missing_df <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(df),
    Pct_Missing = colMeans(is.na(df)) * 100
  ) %>% arrange(desc(Pct_Missing))
  print(missing_df)

  # Prediction matrix
  pred_matrix <- quickpred(df, mincor = 0.3)
  pred_matrix[, sdm_col] <- 1
  pred_matrix[sdm_col, sdm_col] <- 0

  # Impute (m=5 datasets, as described in Methods)
  imputed_data <- mice(df,
                       m = 5,
                       method = method_vec,
                       predictorMatrix = pred_matrix,
                       seed = 42,
                       printFlag = FALSE)

  df_complete <- complete(imputed_data, action = 1)

  cat("Rows with any NA:", sum(rowSums(is.na(df_complete)) > 0), "\n")
  cat("Total NAs:", sum(is.na(df_complete)), "\n")
  cat("N rows:", nrow(df_complete), "\n")

  # Save mids object for pooled analyses in Script 7
  rds_file <- paste0("data_IMP_", short_name, ".rds")
  saveRDS(imputed_data, rds_file)
  cat("Written mids object:", rds_file, "\n")

  # Also save first completed dataset as xlsx (used by other scripts)
  out_file <- paste0("data_IMP_", short_name, ".xlsx")
  write_xlsx(df_complete, out_file)
  cat("Written:", out_file, "\n")

  return(invisible(imputed_data))
}
```

# Run imputation for all 8 disorders

```{r}
for (i in seq_along(disorders)) {
  impute_disorder(disorders[i], short_names[i])
}
```
